chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1400 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection at flag-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Indhar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General along with Inspector Manzoor Hussain Soomro on behalf of SSP Sukkur, Muhammad Ali Assistant Mukhtiarkar on behalf of Assistant Commissioner Pano Aqil and SIP Abdul Rauf Narejo on behalf of SHO PS Cantt..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.10 to 12, which is taken on record. Assistant Mukhtiarkar files statement on behalf of Assistant Commissioner Pano Aqil (Respondent No.5), Inspector Hussain Soomro, files statement on behalf of SSP Sukkur (Respondent No.8) and SIP Abdul Rauf Narejo files statement on behalf of SHO P.S Cant (Respondent No.9), same are taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. The counsel for both the petitioner and respondents agreed on the disposal of the petition on the ground that the Assistant Commissioner has fixed a date for the demarcation. This was confirmed by Assistant Mukhtiarkar Muhammad Ali, who is present in the Court. Accordingly, the respondents are directed to conduct the demarcation on the fixed date in presence of both parties. If any party causes hindrance during the demarcation, the SHO of P.S Cantt shall take action against offending party in accordance with law. In view of the above, the instant petition is hereby disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
